title: Point93 - Assessment Platform
text: Give Feedback Dashboard Assessments 6 View All Your Professional Foundation & Team Structure Your Firm Platform, Technology & Support Your Investment Management Excellence Your Planning Process & Implementation Your Client Service & Communication Your Fees, Value & Positioning Insight Areas Data Points Scores Reports Business Intelligence 5 View All NextGen Ready Client Referrals PitchPerfect COI Referrals Client Retention Risk ADMIN Area Builder BI Builder AI Hub Graph View User Management Analytics Feedback Beta AR Adam Rotmil adam.rotmil@toptal.com Back to Dashboard Your Client Service & Communication 10 points This area measures the service experience that determines whether clients stay, consolidate, and refer: your service clarity and delivery, plus the emotional depth of your client relationships. It reveals whether clients feel like valued partners in an ongoing relationship or simply another account being managed. Total Modules 2 Completed 0 In Progress 0 Not Started 2 Modules in this Area Module 13 Not Started Service Model & Client Experience This module evaluates the operational side of client experience: service definition, delivery consistency, accessibility, and responsiveness. It reveals whether clients have clear expectations that are reliably met—the foundation that must exist before deeper relationship value can develop. 56 questions 14 data points 10 points Start Module Module 14 Not Started Team Coordination & Capability This module measures the emotional quality of your client relationships: personal connection depth, family integration, life event recognition, and client feedback practices. It reveals whether you've created the relationship experience that transforms satisfied clients into genuine advocates for your practice. 32 questions 8 data points 10 points Start Module 0 Advisor Score At Risk Profile Completion 0 of 18 modules · Comprehensive Intelligence Profiles View all → 🎯 NextGen Ready 0% 🎯 Client Referrals 0% What Clients Are Asking Coming Soon Weekly - Jan 27 “Should I be worried about the new fiduciary rule changes?” Advisors rated ready 68% Your readiness 72 - top 34% Improve your ranking → Strengths / Weaknesses Complete modules to see your strengths and areas needing attention Insight Areas Complete modules to see your insight area scores
